fields.Name: TMDb Media Enrichment (Overnight)
fields.Details: Background script for media metadata

fields.Name: IMDbPro Discover Scraper
fields.Details: Finds new film projects

fields.Name: IMDb Talent Enrichment
fields.Details: Extracts professional film/TV credits and industry details from IMDb to build high-fidelity profiles for directors, actors, and producers.

fields.Name: SoundCloud Enrichment Pipeline
fields.Details: Scrapes and enriches SoundCloud metadata including plays, followers, and social links to track artist performance relative to other music platforms.

fields.Name: Deezer Enrichment
fields.Details: Syncs artist and track metadata from Deezer, ensuring Hypebase music profiles have complete coverage of platform-specific metrics.

fields.Name: TMDb Trending Mining (Overnight)
fields.Details: Background script for trending talent

fields.Name: Unified Spotify Artist Enrichment
fields.Details: Standardizes Spotify metadata (followers, popularity, monthly listeners) for all artists in the database to ensure uniform metrics across the platform.
fields.Terminal Command: cd yl-hb-sp && npm run build && node dist/index.js

fields.Name: Box Office Weekly Mining
fields.Details: Extracts latest box office chart data

fields.Name: TMDb Film Trending Mining
fields.Details: Fetches the list of trending movies from the last 24h/week on TMDb to identify rising talent and media assets for the Hypebase discovery feed.

fields.Name: IMDbPro Scraper Worker
fields.Details: Main IMDbPro data scraper

fields.Name: Songkick Event Sync
fields.Details: Maintains an up-to-date calendar of concert and festival appearances for all rostered talent by syncing data from the Songkick API.

fields.Name: Musiclinks Artist Enrichment
fields.Details: Enriches music artists from multiple links

fields.Name: Music Links Media Enrichment
fields.Details: Aggregates and verifies media links (YouTube, Spotify, etc.) for music artists to maintain a single source of truth for platform presence.

fields.Name: Nightly Database Cleanup
fields.Details: Automates database maintenance including cleaning up dead links, pruning orphan records, and refreshing materialized views for dashboard stats.
fields.Terminal Command: cd yl-hb-dtp && Run Periodic Cleanup Scripts

fields.Name: Instagram Profile Sync
fields.Details: Updates Instagram followers and social stats

fields.Name: MusicLinks Social (Overnight)
fields.Details: Enriches music talent profiles

fields.Name: TMDb Social Enrichment (Overnight)
fields.Details: Background script for talent metadata

fields.Name: TMDb Film Popular Mining
fields.Details: Scans TMDb for the current most popular films and discovers new titles that aren't yet in the Hypebase database, creating new media profiles in Supabase.

fields.Name: Rovi Music Enrichment
fields.Details: Enriches data for Rovi/Metal profiles

fields.Name: Twitter (X) Data Sync
fields.Details: Fetches Twitter/X follower counts

fields.Name: AudioDB Artist Enrichment
fields.Details: Fetches metadata from AudioDB

fields.Name: MusicLinks Media (Overnight)
fields.Details: Standardizes music platform profiles

fields.Name: TMDb Popular Mining (Overnight)
fields.Details: Background script for talent mining

fields.Name: Bandsintown Enrichment
fields.Details: Integrates live performance data and upcoming tour dates from Bandsintown into Hypebase talent profiles, enabling the events dashboard.

fields.Name: Music Links Media Enrichment
fields.Details: Aggregates and verifies media links (YouTube, Spotify, etc.) for music artists to maintain a single source of truth for platform presence.
